This '''red-skied planet''' was the site of a [[Battle of unidentified planet (Confederacy of Independent Systems)|battle]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was inhabited by [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] natives that were enslaved by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].
